.clickable-icon.background: rgb(244, 196, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(244, 196, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgb(0, 33, 71) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-file-title.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(244, 196, 48) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 100% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to top, color(srgb 0.470588 0.317647 0.662745 / 0.7) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(0, 53, 107) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(120, 81, 169) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(0, 53, 107), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(124, 252, 0, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.inline-title.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 239, 0), rgb(237, 41, 57)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box text

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(244, 196, 48) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 0.0252838% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.nav-fol.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 239, 0) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 0% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 239, 0) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 0% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.mod-collapsible.tree-it.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 239, 0) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 0% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box

div.is-clickable.nav-file-title.tappable.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(244, 196, 48) 0%, rgb(244, 196, 48) 35%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 50%) no-repeat scroll 100% 50% / 200% 100% padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: color(srgb 0 0.098452 0.198762) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: color(srgb 0 0.098452 0.198762) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: color(srgb 0 0.498039 1 / 0.4) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(17, 17, 17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: color(srgb 0 0.098452 0.198762) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: color(srgb 0 0.207843 0.419608 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0 0.207843 0.419608 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0 0.207843 0.419608 / 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: color(srgb 0 0.115033 0.247495 / 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: color(srgb 0 0.115033 0.247495 / 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: color(srgb 0 0.115033 0.247495 / 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
